Volume dynamics were notable, with an average daily volume of 5208.7705 and a substantial volume increase of 611.7536%, highlighted by high-volume days such as 2026-03-06 with 117865.0 in volume and a 1.6248% price increase. The price movements and volume spikes appear to coincide with various market forecasts, regulatory news, and earnings announcements, though direct causality cannot be definitively established.
